/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/chesseycpp.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chesseycpp.dir/src/board.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chesseycpp.dir/src/moves.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chesseycpp.dir/src/engine.cpp.o -o chesseycpp  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-graphics.3.0.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-window.3.0.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-audio.3.0.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-system.3.0.2.dylib
